ValidationRule.description: You cannot change the payment to an inactive status because it is applied to a transaction fee line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status__c), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Void'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Draft'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Hold'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Expired') ), Applied_Amount__c != 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot change the payment to an inactive status because it is applied to a transaction fee line.
